description: Page 1: Medical treatise in Judaeo-Arabic giving two prescriptions for pediatric ophthalmia (ramad), the second of which is prefaced, "The doctors in Fusṭāṭ use this. . . " Pages 2–4: Calligraphic and vocalized verses, mostly or all from Psalms.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
